name: Wanbangde Pharmaceutical Holding Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Wanbangde Pharmaceutical Holding Group Co., Ltd., an aluminum company, produces and sells aluminum profiles, aluminum decorative sheets, PS aluminum plates, aluminum alloy templates, sliding doors, etc. in China. It also sells its products in Europe, the United States, the Middle East, Africa Southeastern Asia, etc. The company was formerly known as Wanbangde New Building Materials Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Wanbangde Pharmaceutical Holding Group Co., Ltd. in April 2020. Wanbangde Pharmaceutical Holding Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is based in Huzhou, China.
